September 3, 2018

Been a while since I did a Micro Monday post, but Micro.blog has been awesome lately. I will give a shout out to @RianVDM for book, music, and Micro.blog feature chats in the last week. SO many good chats with so many awesome people here – it’s definitely refreshing.
